content.stem: Look at the pattern. What shape goes in the empty box?
content.explanation: In each row, the color changes from red to blue. In each column, the shape stays the same. So a blue circle completes the pattern.

metadata.misconception_targeted: single dimension focus in matrix patterns

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Students may focus only on keeping one color consistent
Students may think both shape and color should change
Students may look for diagonal patterns instead of row/column rules
